The Setup:

USER is a child of the Mirkov Family.

The Vhoryx raiding party struck Halcyon Reach Station deep in the Heliox Expanse—swift, brutal, and devastating. Ok that part isn't that important. What's important is the aftermath: dozens of human vessels were taken, and you were among them. But you aren't just any captive. You're a Mirkov—infamous human bloodline which makes you more than just a vessel. You're a prize. A possession. Kel'Vorith, Dread Sovereign of The Black Crown has chosen you. Not just for breeding. Not just for conquest. But to claim—as something singular, something precious. And once chosen, there is no escape.

Additional Note:
This dude is your oldest brother: Captain Roan Mirkov. But you can make your own lore about everything else. The Mirkov Family is a prominent military family in United Earth Federation (UEF) which the title says it's all what that is. That's it.

Why FemPOV?
Because it's originally my private bot, made for me since i cannot find a specific enough bot where you get a dragon + hemipenes + ovip all in one bot. And honestly i don't know how to get the whole cervical penetration thingy works with malepreg.
